issues.title: Damage spike: enemy dealt 48 dmg (72% of 67 HP) on floor 3
issues.description: At turn seq 119 (floor 3, encounter 2, turn 5), the enemy dealt 48 damage when the player had 67 HP. This is 72% of the player's current HP, exceeding the 50% spike threshold.

evidence.metric: Enemy dealt 48 damage (72% of player's 67 HP)

issues.title: 4 consecutive encounters with >90% HP (floors 1-2)
issues.description: Encounters 0 through 3 (4 in a row) ended with the player above 90% HP (>72). This suggests these encounters provide no meaningful challenge. Encounters: f1e0(HP=74), f1e1(HP=74), f1e2(HP=74), f2e0(HP=73).

issues.title: Player never recovered above 60% HP (48) after floor 3
issues.description: After floor 3, the player's HP remained at or below 48 for all remaining encounters. This indicates healing mechanics are insufficient to sustain a run beyond early floors. HP values: f4e0(HP=28), f4e1(HP=28), f4e2(HP=18), f5e0(HP=18), f5e1(HP=18), f5e2(HP=15), f6e0(HP=15), f6e1(HP=15), f6e2(HP=15), f7e0(HP=15), f7e1(HP=13), f7e2(HP=10), f8e0(HP=10), f8e1(HP=8), f8e2(HP=8), f9e0(HP=6), f9e1(HP=0).
issues.suggestedFix: Increase heal card effectiveness, add campfire healing between floors, or add HP potions as rewards

issues.title: Systemic combo cap bug: maxCombo=3 despite 90.3% accuracy (speed-runner)
issues.description: The speed-runner player achieved 90.3% overall accuracy across 26 encounters, yet maxCombo never exceeded 3. Every single run across ALL profiles shows maxCombo capped at exactly 3, indicating a hard cap bug in the combo system. The combo multiplier progression (1.0x->1.15x->1.3x->1.5x->2.0x) is unreachable beyond combo 3, removing a core damage scaling mechanic.
reproductionSteps: Answer 4+ questions correctly in a single turn
issues.suggestedFix: Investigate combo counter reset logic — likely resets at end of each turn or encounter instead of persisting across consecutive correct answers within a turn. Check if hand size (typically 3-5 cards) is capping combos.

issues.title: Difficulty spike: crystal_golem on floor 2 took 6 turns (prev floor avg: 2.0)
issues.description: Encounter 0 on floor 2 against crystal_golem (common) required 6 turns to resolve, which is 3.0x the previous floor's average of 2.0 turns. This exceeds the 2x threshold for difficulty spikes. The player dealt 54 damage and took 20.
issues.suggestedFix: Review crystal_golem HP/damage scaling for floor 2; consider smoother difficulty curve for common enemies

issues.title: speed-runner defeated on floor 9 with 90.3% accuracy — mid-game scaling too harsh
issues.description: An speed-runner player with 90.3% accuracy should not lose on floor 9. The run ended after 26 encounters. Combined with the combo cap bug (maxCombo=3), damage output cannot keep pace with enemy HP scaling, creating an unwinnable attrition war.
issues.suggestedFix: Fix combo cap bug to unlock higher damage multipliers; review mid-game enemy HP scaling
